description_long: This object is a dirt bike with a compact, rugged frame designed for off-road and urban riding. It features two large, knobby tires for enhanced traction, a prominent front fork, and a streamlined body with a visible seat and handlebars. The silhouette reveals a high ground clearance and a rear swingarm, typical of dirt bikes for absorbing shocks. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, providing better control and maneuverability. The exhaust system is positioned on one side, running parallel to the seat and ending near the rear wheel. The overall design emphasizes durability, agility, and performance for navigating rough or uneven terrain.
description: A rugged dirt bike with large knobby tires, a high ground clearance, and wide handlebars, built for agility and off-road performance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide handlebars, narrow front tire, and compact front fork.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full profile, including the seat, exhaust, large wheels, and rear swingarm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear tire, tail section, and the width of the handlebars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the silhouette of the frame, wheels, and exhaust system.
